stereotype: «Engine» — pure deterministic computation; no I/O; called directly from workflow code without Activity wrapper
volatility: AutoscalerPolicy (per volatilities.md axis 1) — when and how the platform drives capacity changes (scale up / scale down / idle-pause / resume-to-baseline) on an Operated System from observed telemetry. Also the Strategy host for CustomerAppInfrastructure volatility — each infrastructure constituent registers its own scaling strategy behind the same surface.

ops.signature: proposeDesiredState(telemetry: Telemetry, currentDesired: DesiredState, policy: AutoscalerPolicy, infrastructureKind: InfrastructureKind) → Decision
ops.stereotype: pure compute — deterministic, no I/O, called directly in-workflow (no Activity wrapper)
ops.note: Given observed telemetry, current desired capacity, autoscaler policy, and infrastructure kind, return one of five capacity decisions: NoChange | ScaleUp(delta) | ScaleDown(delta) | Pause | Resume(toBaseline)

fields.name: telemetry
fields.note: point-in-time snapshot: load signals (RPS, latency, inflight), capacity signals (replicas, CPU, memory), health/SLO signals, idle duration; Manager pins ObservedAt and TimeSinceLastRequest — engine never reads clock

fields.name: currentDesired
fields.note: current logical desired capacity: OperatedAppID, InfrastructureKind, Replicas (0=paused), LastDecisionAt

fields.name: policy
fields.note: customer-tunable policy: Mode, capacity bounds, idle-pause threshold, load thresholds, SLA tier, operator overrides; policy.Kind must equal infrastructureKind

fields.name: infrastructureKind
fields.note: opaque discriminator selecting the package-internal strategy; must equal policy.Kind and currentDesired.InfrastructureKind

fields.name: Delta
fields.note: populated when Kind == ScaleUp or ScaleDown; bounded by policy.MaxStepDelta

fields.name: ToBaseline
fields.note: populated when Kind == Resume; replica count to resume to (policy.BaselineReplicas modulated by SLATier)

fields.name: Reason
fields.note: structured cause written into DesiredStatePublished audit event by the Manager

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: Method layer-typed error; programmer errors only: ErrContractMisuse, ErrUnknownInfrastructure, ErrInternalInvariant

dataContracts: Telemetry = { OperatedAppID, ObservedAt time.Time, RequestsPerSecond float64, P95LatencyMs float64, InflightRequests int, CurrentReplicas int, CPUUtilization float64, MemoryUtilization float64, Health HealthStatus, SLOStatus SLOStatus, TimeSinceLastRequest time.Duration }
DesiredState = { OperatedAppID, InfrastructureKind, Replicas int, LastDecisionAt time.Time } // 0 replicas == paused; BaselineRef removed (Amendment 1)

AutoscalerPolicy = { Kind InfrastructureKind, Mode AutoscalerMode, MinReplicas int, MaxReplicas int, BaselineReplicas int, MaxStepDelta int, IdleThreshold time.Duration, ScaleUpCPU float64, ScaleDownCPU float64, ScaleDownGrace time.Duration, SLATier SLATier, Pinned bool, MaxBurstCap int }
AutoscalerMode = int enum { AutoscalerModeAuto, AutoscalerModeManual } // Manual always returns NoChange
SLATier = int enum { SLATierFree, SLATierPaid, SLATierEnterprise }
InfrastructureKind = int enum { InfrastructureKindUnknown, InfrastructureKindGoTemporalPostgres } // opaque discriminator; strategy axis is package-internal
Decision = { Kind DecisionKind; Delta int; ToBaseline int; Reason DecisionReason }
DecisionKind = int enum { DecisionNoChange, DecisionScaleUp, DecisionScaleDown, DecisionPause, DecisionResume }

ReasonCode = int enum { ReasonUnknown, ReasonCPUHigh, ReasonCPUSustainedLow, ReasonIdle, ReasonTrafficResumed, ReasonManualMode, ReasonPinned, ReasonSLOBurnDown, ReasonAlreadyAtMin, ReasonAlreadyAtMax }
AutoscalerEngineError = { Kind ErrorKind; Detail string } // ErrorKind: ErrUnknown, ErrContractMisuse, ErrUnknownInfrastructure, ErrInternalInvariant
errorModel: AutoscalerEngineError — programmer errors only (ErrContractMisuse: nil telemetry or mismatched infrastructureKind; ErrUnknownInfrastructure: no strategy registered for the given kind; ErrInternalInvariant: engine bug). All non-retryable. No transient errors — no I/O.
idempotency: Trivially idempotent — pure function. Identical inputs always return identical Decision. No side effects.

revisions.summary: Initial design of proposeDesiredState with Telemetry/DesiredState/AutoscalerPolicy/InfrastructureKind inputs and Decision sum-type output; strategy axis kept package-internal

revisions.byActivity: D-AE senior review — APPROVED with Amendment 1
revisions.summary: SENIOR REVIEW APPROVED. Contract frozen. Amendment 1: BaselineRef removed from DesiredState (Engine deterministically computes Resume.ToBaseline = policy.BaselineReplicas each call; no per-call state round-tripped). All 7 OQs resolved. App C §6 7/9 PASS, 2 WAIVED (single-op Engine with App B §5.2 investigation endorsed). C-AE unblocked.
